rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER VARGAS VS. BARBARA FEDUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Court'S January 30, 2018 Order As To Financial Discovery And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 5,2018 Line 1 . PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER VARGAS Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Court'S January 30, 2018 Order As To Financial Discovery And Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant to produce complete responses to each request by 4:00 p.m. on Tuesday, March 6, 2018. Privacy and third-party privacy objection is overruled. Parties to meet and confer regarding a protective order re: third-party information and present a stipulated order for execution at the hearing. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,577. = (501/REQ)
